title: Alinagarer Golokdhandha
desc: Soham, intrigued by Bengal's history, meets historian Ashutosh, who shares a puzzle from a friend leading to a rare artifact.

title: Khola Hawa
desc: Aditi falls for another man after her divorce, but her past comes back to haunt her.

title: Alinagarer Golokdhadha
desc: Soham and Ashutosh attempt to solve a riddle which leads to a rare artefact.

title: Bhootchakro Private Limited
desc: Three young friends declare themselves ghost hunters whilst searching for spirits. Things take a horrific turn when their lie turns into a truth.

title: Kishmish
desc: Two individuals fall in love, but their relationship faces many trials and tribulations.

title: Bidhataar Lekha
desc: Directed by Raja Mukherjee. With Jeet, Sabyasachi Chakrabarty, Roopa Ganguly, Ayan.

title: Dawshom Awbotaar
desc: Two cops race to stop a serial killer replicating Vishnu's 10 avatars in his murders.

title: Sangram
desc: An idealistic village schoolmaster protests against one man's efforts to win an election campaign that is taking place in the school he teaches at and gets murdered for it.

title: Cockpit
desc: Captain Dibyendu Rakshit must land an aircraft that has been damaged due to turbulence.

title: Kirtan
desc: Manimala dreams of a modern home for her son, but Avinash clings to their ancestral house. Daily, they face conflicts as Arup struggles to balance both sides.

title: Meghnadbodh Rohoshyo
desc: A famous writer Asimavo Bose disappears without a trace, leaving unanswered questions.

title: Happy New Year
desc: A group of friends reunite for a grand celebration, but secrets, betrayal and revenge emerge, turning their joyful night into a dramatic journey of love, loss and redemption.

title: Chaya Manush
desc: A devastated writer meets a man at his friend's place who is aware of the author's life.

title: Jibon Ek Utsab
desc: A grandson wishes to make the last few weeks for his dying grandfather, a time to remember. This gesture comforts him.

title: Cancer
desc: Three siblings share a bitter relationship with each other after their father falls ill.

title: Rong Beronger Korhi
desc: An anthology of four short stories portraying the impact of money on relationships.

title: Sangarsha
desc: An orphan faces oppression after the death of the person who took him in.

title: Guru
desc: Best friends Raja and Iqbal, who hail from different religious backgrounds, help the local people. Their friendship is at stake when Raja's brother falls in love with Iqbal's fiancee.

title: Sentimentaal
desc: Suryaa Roy, a police officer, deals with Rudrani Chowdhury who runs illicit trades.

title: Shakthi
desc: Shakthi presents stories of courage, determination, and perseverance, inspiring viewers through strong character arcs and transformative challenges.

title: Pati Parameshwar
desc: Chaos ensues when a couple's pet dog runs away one afternoon.

title: Abar Bibaho Obhijaan
desc: A gangster lures three friends to Bangkok with a fake lump sum inheritance.

title: Besh Korechi Prem Korechi
desc: Abhi helps the sister of a gangster to elope on the day of her wedding. However, later, his life takes a turn when he falls in love with his other sister.

title: Bogla Mama Jug Jug Jiyo
desc: Bogla Mama, known for his theatre obsession, is hired by a local don to stage a play.

title: Cockpit
desc: Cockpit immerses audiences in high-stakes aviation drama, blending tension, courage, and resilience as characters navigate life-threatening challenges.

title: Black Coffee
desc: A director torn between his wife and his mistress tries to find solace in his creativity.

title: Agni
desc: A police officer is targeted by terrorists, but the terrorists mistakenly kill a bus of schoolchildren, raising crime concerns.

title: Maayakumari
desc: A director sets out to make a biopic on a famed actress and explores her disappearance.

title: Gotro
desc: An elderly woman strikes a unique bond with the ex-convict who is entrusted with taking care of her, in this heartwarming story of love, faith and redemption.

title: Chini
desc: Chaos ensues when Cheeni moves back into her house to look after her mother.

title: Achena Atithi
desc: When Puja is arrested for her in-laws' murder, Prem fights to prove her innocence.

title: Tirandaj Shabor
desc: Cab driver Sumit rushes a sick passenger to the police, only to become the prime suspect when the passenger dies. Investigators uncover dark secrets and numerous potential culprits.

title: Jongole Mitin Mashi
desc: A determined lady detective battles an illegal gang poaching wild elephants. Can she tackle the challenges and save these majestic creatures from extinction?

title: Tenida And Company
desc: Friends Tenida Kyabla Pyala and Habul's holiday in Darjeeling takes a dangerous turn, leaving their survival uncertain.

title: Yuddham Saranang
desc: Warrior Chaitanya leads a fierce battle against enemies threatening his homeland, risking everything to protect honor, people and legacy.

title: Habji Gabji
desc: A young boy, neglected by his ambitious parents, turns to online gaming and becomes addicted. As his obsession deepens, the situation spirals, causing serious problems for his parents.

title: Ballavpur Er Roopkatha
desc: Bhupati Ray tries to sell his haunted palace to clear his debts, but a ghost from his ancestors complicates the process.
